name: cross_consult_request
description: Request a product vision or strategy opinion from the CPO. Available to all researchers and PMs at any point during the workflow. The workflow does not pause for non-blocking requests, but blocking requests must be answered before the agent proceeds.

question.description: Specific, context-rich question about product vision, strategy, user priorities, or competitive positioning

context.description: Research findings, user insights, or constraints relevant to the question

urgency.description: blocking = agent cannot proceed without the answer; non-blocking = answer needed before next stage transition
